title: Battle Ball
description:
Battle Ball is a goofy multiplayer game about dodgeball, with more explosions and fewer rules. The goal in Battle Ball is to knock as many opponents out as you can in under 3 minutes. Team up with friends or join random players! 

Don't have any friends? No problem! With version 1.1 Battle Ball now has a single-player mode where you can battle bots.

Express YourselfEarn Dodgebucks by playing in matches to spice up your look with crazy hats and outfits
 

About the DevDad Hat Games is an independent studio, currently consisting of one member, who is passionate about creating fun experiences and looking forward to creating more projects
description_short: Battle Ball is a goofy online multiplayer game. Play with your team in a 3 v 3 game of loose-rules dodgeball meets twin-stick shooter. Play with your friends or knock them out by teaming up with random players!
